"[1] -------------Original Message---------------- From: 085-El Centro (85) Sent: 5/11/2026 09:41:14 To: 116-Winterhaven Subject: FW: INFO FOR CALTRANS
-------------Original Message---------------- From: 116-S3 Sent: 5/11/2026 09:31:32 To: 085-El Centro Subject: INFO FOR CALTRANS
I RTH'D A TAILGATE BEDLINER FOR A PICKUP TRUCK FROM THE #1 LANE OF I-8E JWO FOURTH AVE TO THE RHS FOR CALTRANS AT THEIR CONVENIENCE // APPROX 1/2 MILE JWO FOURTH AVENUE ON RHS"
